title: ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Multi-tool Utility EDC Pocket Knife with Carry Pouch
description:
Are you in need of a compact and reliable multi-tool for everyday carry? Then the ASR Outdoor Multi-tool Pocket Knife is a great option! Our pocket knife is constructed of high-quality stainless steel that is durable, sturdy, and won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine. In addition to functioning as a knife, it has a number of other useful functions – wood saw, fish scaler with hook disgorger, scissors, can opener, bottle opener, and flathead screwdriver. Designed with safety in mind, features a secure folding mechanism that will hold the blade in place when not in use. It also has a quick-change blade mechanism so you can easily utilize and release the knife for quick deployment. The blade will lock in tightly to help prevent injury during use

ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Multi-tool Utility EDC Pocket Knife with Carry Pouch

Are you in need of a compact and reliable multi-tool for everyday carry? Then the ASR Outdoor Multi-tool Pocket Knife is a great option! Our pocket knife is constructed of high-quality stainless steel that is durable, sturdy, and won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine. In addition to functioning as a knife, it has a number of other useful functions – wood saw, fish scaler with hook disgorger, scissors, can opener, bottle opener, and flathead screwdriver.

Key Features

  • HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION – The ASR Outdoor utility pocket knife is constructed of high-quality stainless steel that is durable, sturdy, and won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine.
  • MULTI-FUNCTION TOOL – Our utility pocket knife has 17 different functions including a blade, sharp wood saw, fish scaler with hook disgorger, scissors, can opener, bottle opener, and a flathead screwdriver, making this the perfect everyday carry tool.
  • SAFE DESIGN – This pocket knife is designed to keep the blade and tools in place when not in use. It features a secure folding mechanism that will ensure that you don’t accidentally open it from within your pocket.
  • QUICK CHANGE BLADE – The pocket knife also features a quick-change blade mechanism so you can easily utilize and release the knife for quick deployment. The blade will also lock in tightly to help prevent injury during use.
  • LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE – The ASR Outdoor folding utility tool is compact and lightweight, making it ideal for men or women. It comes with a convenient nylon carry pouch with a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt for easy access.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: STEELKNI-217
  • UPC: 954213654881
  • Color: Silver

Designed with safety in mind, features a secure folding mechanism that will hold the blade in place when not in use. It also has a quick-change blade mechanism so you can easily utilize and release the knife for quick deployment. The blade will lock in tightly to help prevent injury during use.

The ASR Outdoor folding utility knife is compact and lightweight, making it ideal for men or women. It also comes with a convenient nylon carry pouch with a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt for easy access. This is a great EDC pocket knife option!
